headline: Is It Time To Reassess Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) After Recent Price Weakness?
summary: Some investors may be asking whether Public Service Enterprise Group at about US$78.62 is offering good value right now, or if the easier gains have already been realized. The stock is up 4.6% over the past year and 49.5% over five years. However, it has fallen 1.4% over the past week, 5.4% over the past month and 2.9% year to date, which may have some investors reassessing the balance between opportunity and risk. Recent news around Public Service Enterprise Group has focused on its role as...
